expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: client.ts lines 12-59: isNeonUrl() checks neon.tech/neon.build, NEXT_RUNTIME==='edge' selects drizzleServerless, otherwise drizzleHttp, fallback to drizzlePg

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: client.ts lines 62-82: _db starts as null, getDb() lazily creates instance, db exported as Proxy that delegates on property access

expectations.text: casing snake_case: set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: drizzle.config.ts line 12: casing: 'snake_case'. client.ts lines 42, 50, 58: all three driver paths set casing: 'snake_case'

expectations.text: Files at services/database/ path: SE-2 convention
expectations.evidence: All files under packages/nextjs/services/database/ including client.ts, schema/, repositories/, seed/
repositories/userRepository.ts exports userRepository with findAll, findById, findByAddress, create, update, upsertByAddress, delete

expectations.text: Root proxy scripts for drizzle-kit commands (db:seed, db:wipe, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json: db:generate, db:migrate, db:push, db:pull, db:studio, db:seed, db:wipe, db:check

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml with postgres:16-alpine, port 5432, persistent volume
client.ts checks PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME against DATABASE_URL; seed/wipe.ts same check

expectations.text: All required dependencies: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, @types/pg, tsx
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/package.json has all 8 packages in deps/devDeps
